patterns.title: Prompt compression
patterns.desc: Remove redundancy and shorten system prompts.

patterns.title: Context trimming
patterns.desc: Keep only relevant history and retrieved chunks.

patterns.title: Model routing
patterns.desc: Use the cheapest model that meets quality thresholds.

patterns.title: Prompt caching
patterns.desc: Reuse stable prefixes and repeated queries.

patterns.title: Retry reduction
patterns.desc: Validate outputs and avoid repeated failed calls.

patterns.title: Batch processing
patterns.desc: Move non-urgent jobs to batch workflows.

sources: OpenAI pricing and prompt caching docs
